name: AgriNexus Native Desktop Companion
purpose: Computer-wide visible wake listener for AgriNexus when Chrome is closed or browser microphone access is unavailable.

macos.wakeMode: requires notarized app with microphone and speech recognition permissions

linux.wakeMode: requires desktop speech engine and microphone permission

handoff.auth: Use AGRINEXUS_EMAIL and AGRINEXUS_PASSWORD for desktop demo login, AGRINEXUS_SESSION_COOKIE for manual session handoff, or a production native auth token when the hosted API requires sign-in.
